agents.title: Advertising Product Manager
agents.summary: Owns advertising products so ad formats, delivery experiences, and monetization surfaces create stronger value for advertisers while protecting user experience.

agents.title: Capture, Editing, and Effects Product Manager
agents.summary: Owns capture, editing, and effects workflows so creation tools feel faster, more expressive, and easier for creators to use from first draft to polished output.

agents.title: Cold Start Strategy Product Manager
agents.summary: Owns cold-start strategy so new users, new creators, and new content can enter recommendation systems with stronger initial exposure and healthier quality signals.

agents.title: Community Governance Product Manager
agents.summary: Owns community-governance product coordination so participation systems, safety controls, and moderation workflows stay better aligned with healthy community development.

agents.title: Creator Incentives Product Manager
agents.summary: Owns creator-incentive products so participation, contribution quality, and creator motivation can be improved with clearer reward mechanics and healthier ecosystem outcomes.

agents.title: Creator Tools and Insights Product Manager
agents.summary: Owns creator tools and performance insights so creators can manage output, monitor results, and make better publishing decisions with clearer data support.

agents.title: Direct Messaging and Group Chat Product Manager
agents.summary: Owns direct messaging and group chat experiences so private communication stays useful, safer, and better integrated with the broader creator and community journey.

agents.title: Ecommerce Product Manager
agents.summary: Owns ecommerce products so shopping journeys, creator commerce surfaces, and transaction enablement features fit more naturally into the content platform experience.

agents.title: Engagement Interactions Product Manager
agents.summary: Owns likes, comments, shares, and related interaction loops so user engagement features stay intuitive, expressive, and aligned with healthy community participation.

agents.title: Feed and Immersive Playback Product Manager
agents.summary: Owns feed and immersive playback experiences so content discovery, session continuity, and full-screen viewing behavior feel more engaging and coherent across the platform.

agents.title: Follow and Fan Graph Product Manager
agents.summary: Owns follow and fan-graph products so relationship signals, creator reach, and audience-building mechanics stay stronger and more coherent across the platform.

agents.title: Gift and Revenue Share Strategy Manager
agents.summary: Owns livestream gifting and revenue share strategy so monetization mechanics, creator incentives, and platform economics stay balanced and sustainable.

agents.title: Gifting and Co-Host Rules Product Manager
agents.summary: Owns gifting systems and co-host rule products so monetization, collaborative live formats, and participation safeguards stay balanced and easier to govern.

agents.title: Growth Experimentation Product Manager
agents.summary: Owns growth experimentation design so hypothesis testing, rollout discipline, and learning loops improve growth decisions with stronger causal evidence.

agents.title: Live Interaction Mechanics Product Manager
agents.summary: Owns live interaction mechanics so participatory features, session energy, and viewer-host engagement patterns stay compelling and operationally manageable.

agents.title: Livestream Governance Product Manager
agents.summary: Owns livestream-governance product coordination so live safety controls, moderation tooling, and policy execution stay well aligned with product experience decisions.

agents.title: Livestream Room Product Manager
agents.summary: Owns livestream-room product experiences so hosts, viewers, and moderators can navigate live sessions with clearer controls, stronger engagement, and smoother room operations.

agents.title: Membership Product Manager
agents.summary: Owns membership products so subscription value, premium user journeys, and monetization retention mechanics improve with clearer product positioning.

agents.title: Membership Subscription Product Manager
agents.summary: Owns membership subscription product strategy so plan structure, paid entitlements, and premium experience design improve retention and long-term recurring engagement.

agents.title: Multi-Objective and Constraints Strategy Product Manager
agents.summary: Owns multi-objective and constraints strategy so recommendation and distribution systems can balance growth, quality, risk, monetization, and fairness more coherently.

agents.title: Publishing Workflow Product Manager
agents.summary: Owns publishing workflows so creators can move from draft to release with clearer controls, fewer failure points, and stronger confidence in the publishing path.

agents.title: Recommendation Strategy Product Manager
agents.summary: Owns recommendation strategy so ranking objectives, user satisfaction, and ecosystem outcomes stay balanced across personalized content distribution decisions.

agents.title: Referrals and Invitations Product Manager
agents.summary: Owns referral and invitation products so sharing loops, user-led growth channels, and invite mechanics produce stronger and healthier acquisition outcomes.

agents.title: Retention and Reactivation Product Manager
agents.summary: Owns retention and reactivation products so returning-user behavior, habit formation, and churn-recovery flows stay more effective across the content platform lifecycle.

agents.title: Retrieval and Ranking Objectives Product Manager
agents.summary: Defines retrieval and ranking objectives so recommendation systems can optimize for clearer business goals, user value, and ecosystem-quality tradeoffs.

agents.title: Revenue Sharing Product Manager
agents.summary: Owns revenue-sharing products so creator payouts, settlement logic, and monetization incentives stay transparent, scalable, and easier to operate.

agents.title: Search Product Manager
agents.summary: Owns search products so intent understanding, result usefulness, and content retrieval quality improve across the platform's discovery journeys.

agents.title: Topics and Communities Product Manager
agents.summary: Owns topics and community products so conversations, interest hubs, and user participation structures become easier to navigate and scale more effectively.

agents.title: User Acquisition and Conversion Product Manager
agents.summary: Owns user-acquisition and conversion products so growth entry points, onboarding flows, and new-user activation patterns convert more effectively.

agents.title: Viewing Experience and Quality Strategy Product Manager
agents.summary: Owns viewing experience and video-quality strategy so playback smoothness, visual clarity, and user satisfaction improve across varying devices and network conditions.
